summary: Phase C P2 - Custom Lists on Recruiting Board. Full backend + UI testing completed. All 8 backend API tests pass. All UI flows verified: create, rename, delete, move player, table view violet badge, validation, persistence.

minor.issue: Returns 409 (Conflict) for duplicate/default name validation, not 400 (Bad Request). Both are acceptable; 409 is semantically correct for conflicts.

critical_code_review_comments: Delete uses window.confirm() - works but is not customizable or testable via UI component approach. Consider replacing with a styled modal dialog in future for consistency with rest of app UI.

No visible inline error message shown in UI when create-list fails (e.g., duplicate name) - the backend returns 409 but the frontend error handling may only show an alert(). Confirmed error selector finds element, but error text was empty - may be using alert() instead of inline error display.
seed_data_creation: None - all test lists created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C P2 fully verified. Custom lists work end-to-end: create (violet-styled column), rename (inline edit with pencil icon), delete (window.confirm + player moves to Watch List), move player (→ ListName button on card), table view violet badge (bg-violet-900/50 text-violet-300), persistence (DB-backed via custom_lists JSONB), validation (Watch List/Committed/duplicate → 409 rejected). Board uses horizontal scroll for extra columns. Coach in clean state (0 custom lists) after all tests completed.

test_results.backend_create_custom_list: PASS - POST adds list, returned in array
test_results.backend_rename: PASS - PATCH renames correctly, old name removed
test_results.backend_persistence: PASS - GET after POST returns persisted list
test_results.ui_add_btn_visible: PASS - add-custom-list-btn found after default columns
test_results.ui_create_column: PASS - custom-list-column-{name} appears with violet styling
test_results.ui_move_player: PASS - → {list name} button moves player to custom column
test_results.ui_table_violet_badge: PASS - bg-violet-900/50 text-violet-300 badge in Table view
test_results.ui_rename: PASS - inline pencil icon edit, Enter/checkmark confirms
test_results.ui_delete_window_confirm: PASS - delete with window.confirm, column removed
test_results.ui_delete_moves_to_watch_list: PASS - player moved to Watch List after delete
test_results.ui_persistence_reload: PASS - custom lists persist/disappear after page reload
test_results.ui_validation_watch_list: PASS - error shown for Watch List name attempt
